calls.name: get_profile
calls.output: {"name": "Alba Cristina Magalh\u00e3es Alves de Melo", "photoUrl": "http://servicosweb.cnpq.br/wspessoa/servletrecuperafoto?tipo=1&id=K4797106D2", "fellowship": "Bolsista de Produtividade em Pesquisa do CNPq - N\u00edvel 1C - CA CC - Ci\u00eancias da Computa\u00e7\u00e3o", "summary": "Alba Cristina Magalhaes Alves de Melo obtained her PhD degree in Computer Science from the Institut National Polytechnique de Grenoble (INPG), France, in 1996. In 2008, she was a PostDoc Researcher at the University of Ottawa, Canada; in 2011 she was invited as a Guest Scientist at the Universit\u00e9 Paris-Sud, France; in 2013 she did a sabbatical at the Universitat Polit\u00e8cnica de Catalunya, Spain and in 2018 she was invited as a Guest Scientist at the Institut National Polytechnique de Grenoble, France. Since 1997, she is with the Department of Computer Science of the University of Brasilia (UnB) where she is now Full Professor and Head of the Department. Prof. Melo is Member of the Council of the Brazilian Computer Society (2021-2025), Vice-chair of the IEEE Technical Committee in Parallel Processing and Member of the Brazilian Delegation for the BRICS Working Group on High Performance Computing and Information and Communication Technologies (BRICS WG on HPC-ICT). Her research interests include High Performance Computing, Accelerators (GPU, FPGA), Bioinformatics and Clouds. One of the PhD Thesis advised by Prof. Melo was awarded the Best PhD Thesis in Computer Science in Brazil (Premio Capes de Tese) in 2016. She is also recipient of the 2023 IEEE TCPP Outstanding Service and Contributions Award and the 2019 Wilkes Award for the Best Paper published at The Computer Journal in 2018. Prof. Melo is a Senior Member of the IEEE Society and the IEEE Computer Society. She was Associate Editor of IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems (2015-2019) and she is currently Associate Editor of IEEE Transactions on Computers, Journal of Parallel and Distributed Computing, Future Generations Computing Systems and ACM Computing Surveys. Prof. Melo was co-General Chair of IEEE IPDPS 2024. She served as Program Chair at HiPEAC 2025, co-Program Chair at IEEE/ACM CCGrid 2025, co-Program Chair in IEEE IPDPS 2019 and IEEE SBAC-PAD 2017. In addition, she served as co-Track Chair in several prestigious conferences such as Euro-Par 2025, IEEE Cluster 2023, Supercomputing (SC) 2022, IEEE IPDPS 2022, Euro-Par 2020.Prof. Melo was keynote speaker at prestigious conferences (Euro-Par 2021, SBAC-PAD 2023 and CARLA 2020) and in several international workshops. She coordinated international collaboration projects with Spain and Canada and participates/participated in several international projects with the European Commission, France and Germany, among others. Grande \u00e1rea: Ci\u00eancias Exatas e da Terra Grande \u00c1rea: Ci\u00eancias Biol\u00f3gicas / \u00c1rea: Gen\u00e9tica. Setores de atividade: Desenvolvimento de Programas (Software). Palavras-chave: algoritmos paralelos; distributed shared memory; message passing; memory consistency models.", "Computa\u00e7\u00e3o em Ambientes Heterog\u00eaneos para Aplica\u00e7\u00f5es de Bioinform\u00e1tica", "Objetivo: Essa linha de pesquisa tem como objetivo investigar o uso de ambientes heterog\u00eaneos para a acelera\u00e7\u00e3o da obten\u00e7\u00e3o de resultados de aplica\u00e7\u00f5es de bioinform\u00e1tica que exigem alto poder de processamento. Investiga-se o uso de redes heterog\u00eaneas, grid computing e hardwares reconfigur\u00e1veis e GPUs.. Grande \u00e1rea: Ci\u00eancias Exatas e da Terra Grande \u00c1rea: Engenharias / \u00c1rea: Engenharia El\u00e9trica. Grande \u00c1rea: Ci\u00eancias Biol\u00f3gicas / \u00c1rea: Gen\u00e9tica. Setores de atividade: Produtos e Processos Biotecnol\u00f3gicos Vinculados \u00c0 Sa\u00fade Humana Ou dos Animais; Fabrica\u00e7\u00e3o de Equipamentos de Inform\u00e1tica e M\u00e1quinas Para Escrit\u00f3rio; Desenvolvimento de Programas (Software). Palavras-chave: bioinformatics; FPGAs; grid computing; GPU."], "awards": ["IEEE TCPP Outstanding Service and Contributions Award, IEEE Computer Society.", "IEEE TPDS Award for Editorial Excellence, IEEE Computer Society.", "Wilkes Award - Best Paper Published in The Computer Journal in 2018, Oxford University Press.", "Orientadora de Tese - Men\u00e7\u00e3o Honrosa no WSCAD-CTD 2018, Sociedade Brasileira de Computa\u00e7\u00e3o.", "Orientadora da 3a Melhor Tese de Doutorado da SBC - CTD 2016, Sociedade Brasileira de Computa\u00e7\u00e3o.", "Orientadora da Tese Vencedora do Pr\u00eamio Capes de Tese em Computa\u00e7\u00e3o 2016, Capes.", "Orientadora da Tese Vencedora do WSCAD-CTD 2016, Sociedade Brasileira de Computa\u00e7\u00e3o.", "Best Paper Award I2TS 2004, International Information and Telecommunication Technologies Symposium.", "IEEE Senior Member, IEEE Society."]}

rawResponse.instructions:
You are an assistant that answers questions about a researcher.
You have access to tools to gather information about the researcher's lattes curriculum.
Your goal is to produce accurate, concise and information-grounded answers.
Guidelines:
- Use only the available information from the tools to answer the question.
- Inform if the provided information isn't enough to answer the question.
- Be concise and precise.
- Do not make assumptions or use external knowledge.

Palavras-chave: algoritmos paralelos; distributed shared memory; message passing; memory consistency models.", "Computa\u00e7\u00e3o em Ambientes Heterog\u00eaneos para Aplica\u00e7\u00f5es de Bioinform\u00e1tica", "Objetivo: Essa linha de pesquisa tem como objetivo investigar o uso de ambientes heterog\u00eaneos para a acelera\u00e7\u00e3o da obten\u00e7\u00e3o de resultados de aplica\u00e7\u00f5es de bioinform\u00e1tica que exigem alto poder de processamento. Investiga-se o uso de redes heterog\u00eaneas, grid computing e hardwares reconfigur\u00e1veis e GPUs.. content.text: The researcher works mainly in **Ciência da Computação (Computer Science)**, especially in **systems/software, computer architecture, parallel programming, and bioinformatics**.
